context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 complete. All 6 BIQc trust restoration deliverables verified. approve_identity screen only shows during new user onboarding (entry='approve_identity'), not for already-calibrated users. Test user has calibration COMPLETE so approve_identity won't appear in normal flow - verified via code review. Market page shows 'Waiting for data' when no cognitive snapshot available, 'On Track' when data exists. Mobile nav only appears after full app boot loader completes (30-60 seconds).

mocked_api_confirmation.note: CRM (HubSpot) is REAL via Merge.dev. Cognitive data comes from Supabase Edge Function (biqc-insights-cognitive).

note_on_approve_identity_testing: approve_identity screen cannot be tested via UI with existing calibrated user - only shows for new users during onboarding. Code structure and data-testids verified via code review.
